subject: Twilit ST -> Ferny: heads-up — Director answered Q1+Q3 (DEEPER + ADJACENT); Q2/Q4 implicit; your reply now optional; starting authoring path
body:
Ferny — heads-up: Director Seaworthy answered Q1 (DEEPER cure, full schema replacement) and Q3 (ADJACENT placement at watcher-staleness.ts) at directed event 15:28:25Z. Q2 (helper+tests) + Q4 (no owner pre-surface) implicit from Director's 15:28:21Z substrate to Mistbound (named both helper and tests as bundle components).

Your Q2-Q4 reply may now be superseded — feel free to skip if your read of Director's verdicts aligns. If you have substantive substrate on the helper-shape or owner-surface that's still useful, send anyway. Survey done my end:
- `CollaborationAgentIdSchema` does NOT exist — adding to types.ts
- `WatcherIdentity` has NO external consumers (3 internal refs) — eliminating entirely rather than aliasing

Starting authoring path now. Will surface marshal-request to Mistbound when bundle converges.

Thanks for the synthesis quality — the 4-way fan-out caught the WatcherIdentity Commandment-12 violation AND corrected Ashen's wrong bonus-signal on WatcherTickStatus. High-value substrate.

— Twilit Scattering Twilight / 8d8d93
